mapper.select: /* rcp.rcptmgmt.openDataUpd.getMcpRequestInfo */ SELECT TO_CHAR(REQUEST_KEY) AS REQUEST_KEY , SCAN_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo}
mapper.insert: /* rcp.rcpMgmt.openDataUpd.insertEmvScanMst */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_MST ( SCAN_ID , WORK_ID , AGENCY_ID , COMPANY_ID , CUST_NM , C_MEMO , DOC_TITLE , SCAN_FILE_CNT , USE_YN , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , DEL_REASON , DOC_STATUS , ONLINE_YN ) SELECT SCAN_ID , WORK_ID , AGENCY_ID , COMPANY_ID , CUST_NM , C_MEMO , DOC_TITLE , SCAN_FILE_CNT , USE_YN , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , DEL_REASON , DOC_STATUS , ONLINE_YN FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}

/* rcp.rcpMgmt.openDataUpd.insertEmvScanFile */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE ( FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , FILE_NUMBER , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , DOC_ID , MAIN_DOC_CD , USE_YN , ORIGIN_DIR , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , SAVE_DIR ) SELECT FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , FILE_NUMBER , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , DOC_ID , MAIN_DOC_CD , USE_YN , ORIGIN_DIR , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , SAVE_DIR FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
mapper.delete: /* rcp.rcpMgmt.openDataUpd.deleteMspRequest */ DELETE FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
/* rcp.rcpMgmt.openDataUpd.deleteEmvScanMst */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_MST WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
/* rcp.rcpMgmt.openDataUpd.deleteEmvScanFile */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
